{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Perfected Gunner
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The title of [[Perfected Gunner]] had already been taken by the time [[Zyrana]] passed her trials.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
